judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (crosshair reticle, single dark object, black redaction bars, timestamp at bottom left) and do not contradict each other on specific text; Description B adds the specific timestamp date while A does not, but they do not conflict.
original_image_tags: infrared sensor still frame showing a small, dark, elongated object centered in a crosshair reticle. The reticle consists of a thin white horizontal line and a thin white vertical line intersecting at the image's center. The horizontal line has a small tick mark labeled "3" on the left and right sides, near the ends. The object is a compact, dark smudge or blob, located at the exact intersection of the crosshairs. The background is a grainy, uniform gray texture typical of IR/SWIR imaging. The image is framed by eight black rectangular redaction blocks: one large block across the top edge, and three smaller blocks along each of the left and right vertical edges, partially obscuring the field of view. A timestamp is overlaid in white text at the bottom left corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Grainy monochrome infrared-style image with a central crosshair and numeric marks “3” on both sides, showing two small adjacent dark blobs near the center and a timestamp “12/31/99 18:20:48” at bottom left.*
